local_results.title: Find
local_results.description: Mellow shop for hip, secondhand attire. Low-key boutique offering stylish vintage & modern used clothing for men & women, plus accessories.
local_results.user_review: "The prices are super fair and everyone is super friendly."

local_results.title: The Maine Mall
local_results.address: 364 Maine Mall Rd, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Brand-name stores in a comfy setting. Retail center with a familiar feel offering 100+ chain stores, a food court & bowling alley.
local_results.user_review: "Lots of stores to choose from with competitive prices too!"

local_results.title: Material Objects
local_results.description: Store selling secondhand men's and women's apparel, including vintage pieces.
local_results.user_review: "good selection with very fair prices."

local_results.title: Pine Tree Shopping Center
local_results.description: Open-air shopping center with a variety of retailers, restaurants, and services.
local_results.user_review: "They have the BEST DEALS after summer ect.90%Very happy with my findings!"

local_results.title: Little Ghost
local_results.description: Funky shop for vintage fashions. Offbeat store carrying an assortment of vintage clothing & accessories, plus kitschy decor.
local_results.user_review: "Super cute, well organized and great prices!"

local_results.title: Weekend Vintage
local_results.description: Merchant stocking a curated collection of vintage clothing, from leather jackets to scarves.
local_results.user_review: "good selection and fair prices for the quality."

local_results.title: Portland Flea-for-All
local_results.description: Cool source for vintage goods & clothes. Funky market with an eclectic collection of vintage furniture, clothing & more from various vendors.
local_results.user_review: "amazing store, nice reasonable prices."

local_results.title: The Maine Souvenir Shop - Portland
local_results.description: Bright, friendly shop selling apparel, stickers, books, hats, souvenirs and other items by Maine artists.
local_results.user_review: "48 for a nice hoodie is a solid price for a Souvenir."

local_results.title: Portland Closeout
local_results.user_review: "Great stuff, high prices."

local_results.title: Cool As A Moose
local_results.description: Quirky shop for Maine-themed tees and trinkets, plus sunglasses and souvenirs.
local_results.user_review: "Good items, great service, prices are high but expected for souvenirs"

local_results.title: The Merchant Company
local_results.description: Cool shop for locally made gifts. Charming outpost for pottery, stationery, clothing & jewelry made by local crafts people.
local_results.user_review: "Good selection and solid prices."

local_results.title: Still A Good Cause Thrift Shop
local_results.user_review: "Great prices and selection."

local_results.title: Everchanging Seasons Consignment Boutique
local_results.user_review: "Great pieces and even better prices!"

local_results.title: Save A Lot
local_results.description: Source for discount groceries. Discount supermarket chain carrying brand-name & private-label grocery items.
local_results.user_review:
"WOW,What a savings on my
Food budget
A Great place to save A LOT of money"

local_results.title: Union Station Plaza Shopping Center
local_results.description: Shopping center housing a variety of stores, including a hardware store, coffee shop, and laundromat.
local_results.user_review: "Good value.Nice staff.Accept all payment forms.Clean and well organized."

local_results.title: Bob’s Discount Furniture and Mattress Store
local_results.description: Store selling home furnishings. Chain retailer with a large selection of discount furniture, home accents & mattresses.
local_results.user_review: "Very friendly and helpful, Excellent variety of merchandise at a good price"

local_results.title: Nomads Adventure & Active Wear
local_results.user_review: "The shop was lovely and full of quality gear at great prices!"

local_results.title: Nordstrom Rack
local_results.address: 200 Running Hill Rd, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Outlet for the department store chain for designer clothing and accessories, plus shoes and beauty products.
local_results.user_review: "Amazing selection, low prices & very friendly staff!!!!"

local_results.title: Duluth Trading Company
local_results.address: 55 Maine Mall Rd, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: American retailer that carries durable workwear (men's and women's styles).
local_results.user_review: "Clearance sale, great products at a great price!"

local_results.title: Urban Outfitters
local_results.description: Hip retailer for apparel & home decor. Chain with a hipster vibe known for on-trend fashions, accessories & quirky home-decor items.
local_results.user_review: "Good prices on street wear."
